title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to set up Claude Code with Ollama for free, select LLMs like Qwen 3.5, and build an agentic AI travel application locally using Python and Flask. The guide covers installation, configuration, project structure, and deployment without paid APIs.
